name: Hop

aliases.name: Params
aliases.comment: A Dict that holds parameters for the current route

aliases.name: Payload
aliases.comment: Payload returned by the router when calling routing actions

values.name: clearQuery
values.comment:
Clear all query string values

    update action model =
      case action of
        ...
        ClearQuery ->
          (model, Effects.map HopAction (Hop.clearQuery model.routerPayload.url))

values.name: navigateTo
values.comment:
Changes the location (hash and query)

    update action model =
      case action of
        ...
        NavigateTo path ->
          (model, Effects.map HopAction (Hop.navigateTo path))

values.name: new
setQuery
values.comment:
Set query string values

    update action model =
      case action of
        ...
        SetQuery query ->
          (model, Effects.map HopAction (Hop.setQuery model.routerPayload.url query))

  To remove a value set the value to ""
